titulo: Claude is a space to think
resumen: Anthropic anuncia que Claude permanecerá sin publicidad para preservar su función como asistente genuinamente útil. La empresa argumenta que los incentivos publicitarios son incompatibles con ofrecer apoyo imparcial, dado que los usuarios comparten información personal sensible en las conversaciones.
contenido:
Anthropic announces Claude will remain ad-free to preserve its function as a genuinely helpful assistant. The company argues that advertising incentives are incompatible with providing unbiased support, particularly given how users share sensitive personal information in conversations. Rather than pursue ad-supported revenue, Anthropic relies on enterprise contracts and paid subscriptions while expanding access through educational programs and nonprofit discounts.

[Leer artículo completo](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-is-a-space-to-think)
